parent_deal.close_notes: Close date approximate from Lilly tender completion; confirm if needed.

efforts_notes: Confirm efforts covenant in EX-2.5 CVR Agreement.

milestones.description: Receipt of all regulatory approvals required to initiate marketing/sale of any Prevail gene therapy product from programs PR001, PR004, PR006, PR005, PR008, PR009, PR010, PR011, PR012, or PR014 (incl. forms/improvements) in US, UK, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, or Japan
milestones.amount_schedule: If achieved on/before 2024-12-31: $4.00. From 2025-01-01, amount declines by 1/48 per full calendar month (~$0.083) until Expiration Date 2028-12-01, then $0.
milestones.notes: As of 2026-07, full $4.00 window has passed; any future payout would be the stepped-down amount per monthly schedule. Payable once only.

current_max_notes: [Assumption] For July 2026 (~18 full months after Jan 2025): $4.00 * (47-18)/48 ≈ $2.42 if hit in that month. Recompute exactly from CVR Agreement formula before any IRR.
fairness_notes: Fairness opinion: extract from Prevail Schedule 14D-9 / Lilly offer docs on EDGAR.
